topic.date_range_guidance: Prioritise 2015-2026. Use older authoritative multiplier/method sources only where still standard.
priority_venues: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management

database_search_strings.Scopus/WoS: (construction OR infrastructure OR "built asset") AND (job* OR employ* OR workforce OR FTE OR "job-years") AND (capex OR "economic impact" OR "jobs per million")
database_search_strings.Google Scholar: "jobs per million" construction capex OR "job-years" "economic impact"
database_search_strings.Australia grey lit: site:gov.au construction jobs economic impact capex PDF

topic.topic_title: Hospital school and housing construction and operations jobs per capex
topic.research_goal: Find credible construction and operational employment metrics for hospitals, health facilities, schools, universities, affordable housing, residential construction, and civic buildings with capex and facility scale. Use for community opportunity-cost framing only — not as functional substitutes for data centres. Look for jobs per construction spend, permanent FTE per bed or dwelling, planning business cases, and Australian examples where available.
subtopic_axes: hospital construction jobs per million dollars capital cost
hospital operational FTE per bed or per floor area
school and university campus construction jobs per capex
affordable housing and residential construction jobs per million investment
Australian health and education infrastructure business cases with workforce figures

search_batches.name: hospitals
search_batches.description: Hospital project economic impact and business cases.

search_batches.name: housing
search_batches.description: Residential and affordable housing construction employment.

keyword_bundles: hospital construction economic impact jobs capital investment
hospital jobs per bed FTE capital cost
school construction economic impact jobs capital investment
affordable housing construction jobs per million investment
Australian hospital construction jobs capital investment permanent staff
grey_lit_search_strings: site:gov.au hospital construction jobs economic impact PDF
residential construction jobs per million dollars investment
